calendar.matters:
Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Accounting And Appoint Of Successor Trustee, Or Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Kane for Martin Lyon.

The Court noted that no one was present on behalf of the Trustee. Mr. Kane stated that the Trustee is not cooperative, but that the Sons are much more cooperative. The Court stated that the amended petition stands unopposed, and that it will remove the Trustee and appoint the nominated Trustee. The Court also stated that it is not inclined to address other issues regarding payment and it should be addressed by the new Trustee. Mr. Kane provided a revised order withdrawing the request for fees and setting bond. The Amended Petition for Removal of Trustee, Accounting and Appointment of Successor Trustee is granted in part (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Barrientos. Not reported.
